allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('diamond:', find\('diamond'\)\); console.log\('bolt:', find\('bolt'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('settings:', find\('settings'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('shop:', find\('shop'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('shield:', find\('shield'\).slice\(0,15\)\); console.log\('home-2:', find\('home-2'\)\); console.log\('chat-round:', find\('chat-round'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('gift:', find\('gift'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('close:', find\('close'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('heart:', find\('heart'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('user:', find\('user'\).slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('gem:', find\('gem'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('crystal:', find\('crystal'\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('chat-round-dots:', find\('chat-round-dots'\)\); console.log\('heart-bold:', names.filter\(n=>n==='heart-bold' || n.startsWith\('heart-'\)\)\); console.log\('user-bold:', names.filter\(n=>n==='user-bold' || n.startsWith\('user-circle'\)\)\); console.log\('star:', find\('star'\).slice\(0,15\)\); console.log\('crown:', find\('crown'\).slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('arrow-left:', find\('arrow-left'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('alt-arrow:', find\('alt-arrow'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('verified:', find\('verified'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('check-circle:', find\('check-circle'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('plus:', find\('plus'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('close-bold:', find\('close'\).filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('close-circle'\)\).slice\(0,3\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); console.log\('minus-bold:', names.filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('minus-'\)\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('hashtag:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('multiplication'\) || n.includes\('xmark'\)\).slice\(0,8\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('menu-dots:', find\('menu-dots'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('smile:', find\('smile'\).slice\(0,6\)\); console.log\('send:', find\('send'\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('plane:', find\('plane'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('emoji:', find\('emoji'\).slice\(0,5\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('emoji-funny:', find\('emoji-funny'\).slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('paperplane:', find\('plane'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('round-arrow:', names.filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('round-arrow'\) || n.startsWith\('round-alt-arrow'\)\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('alt-arrow-right:', names.filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('alt-arrow-right'\)\).slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('telegram:', find\('telegram'\).slice\(0,3\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@iconify-json/solar/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(d.icons\); const find=\(q\)=>names.filter\(n=>n.includes\(q\)\); console.log\('key:', find\('key-'\).filter\(n=>n.endsWith\('-bold'\)\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('gift:', find\('gift-'\).filter\(n=>n.endsWith\('-bold'\)\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('crown:', names.filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('crown-'\)&&n.endsWith\('-bold'\)\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('trophy:', find\('trophy'\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('cup-:', names.filter\(n=>n.startsWith\('cup-'\)&&n.endsWith\('-bold'\)\).slice\(0,8\)\);")
